title: Variety: Bad Bunny Eyed for Role in Tom Hanks Baseball Film "The Comebacker"
detail: Variety reports that Bad Bunny is being considered for a supporting role in "The Comebacker," a baseball-themed film directed by Marielle Heller and starring Tom Hanks. Sony is leading acquisition bidding for the project. The report continues a pattern of Bad Bunny expanding into film acting following roles in *Bullet Train* (2022) and *Cassandro* (2023).
